facts.label: Cash-for-Vote Case
facts.value: Arrested May 31, 2015 with Rs 50 lakh. Case still pending.

facts.label: Asset Growth
facts.value: Rs 3.6 crore (2009) to Rs 30.05 crore (2023) — 8x increase

contradictions.then: Called MEIL an 'East India Company' exploiting Telangana
contradictions.now: Gave MEIL a Rs 4,350 crore contract for Kodangal constituency

contradictions.then: Attacked BRS for state debt of Rs 3.14 lakh crore
contradictions.now: Borrowing at 2x the pace — Rs 1,52,918 crore in 15 months

contradictions.then: Filed ACB charges against KTR for Rs 55 crore Formula E spending
contradictions.now: Spent ~Rs 100 crore on Messi exhibition match

contradictions.then: Called Sonia Gandhi 'Bali Devatha' (sacrificial deity) during TDP tenure
contradictions.now: Now serves as CM under the Congress party she leads
